016package org.consensusj.bitcoinj.signing;
017
018import org.bitcoinj.base.Coin;
019import org.bitcoinj.base.Sha256Hash;
020import org.bitcoinj.core.TransactionInput;
021import org.bitcoinj.core.TransactionOutPoint;
022import org.bitcoinj.script.Script;
023
024import java.util.Objects;
025
026/**
027 * Immutable aggregate of data for TransactionInput. This holds the same data as {@link Utxo.Complete} and
028 * the two may be combined in the future.
029 */
030public class TransactionInputDataUtxo implements TransactionInputData, Utxo {
031    private final Sha256Hash txId;
032    private final int index;
033    private final long amount;
034    private final Script script;
035
036    /**
037     * @param txId parent txId (shouldn't be needed but Transaction.addSignedInput currently needs an Outpoint)
038     * @param index index of unspent output
039     * @param amount amount of unspent output
040     * @param script This is the scriptPubKey of the utxo we want to spend
041     */
042    public TransactionInputDataUtxo(Sha256Hash txId, int index, Coin amount, Script script) {
043        this.txId = Objects.requireNonNull(txId);
044        this.index = index;
045        this.amount = amount != null ? amount.getValue() : 0;        // TODO: Throw when amount is null?
046        this.script = Objects.requireNonNull(script);
047    }
048
049    public Sha256Hash txId() {
050        return txId;
051    }
052
053    public int index() {
054        return index;
055    }
056
057    @Override
058    public Coin amount() { return Coin.ofSat(amount); }
059
060    @Override
061    public Script script() {
062        return script;
063    }
064    
065    public TransactionInput toMutableInput() {
066        return createTransactionInput(toOutPoint(), Coin.ofSat(amount), script);
067    }
068
069    @Override
070    public Utxo.Complete toUtxo() {
071        return Utxo.of(txId, index, Coin.ofSat(amount), script);
072    }
073
074    @Override
075    public TransactionOutPoint toOutPoint() {
076        return new TransactionOutPoint(index, txId);
077    }
078
079    private static TransactionInput createTransactionInput(TransactionOutPoint outPoint, Coin amount, Script script) {
080        return new TransactionInput( null, script.program(), outPoint, amount);
081    }
082}
